subject: A group of warriors enclosed in a large dome of magical energy, raising spears and weapons together against unseen enemies on a rocky battlefield
description: A wide scene depicts multiple humanoid warrior figures standing within a large translucent dome of glowing magical energy. The dome fills most of the frame, with rocky terrain visible at its edges. Inside the dome, at least three figures are visible — they hold spears and other weapons raised, standing in a defiant posture. The light from within the dome creates a warm golden-white glow. The surrounding landscape is barren rock. The composition communicates a last-stand or protective-barrier moment — a small group holding together against encircling threat.
foreground: group of warriors inside glowing magical dome, weapons raised
background: rocky barren terrain, edge of dome, dark horizon
emotion: defiant unity, courage under siege, last stand
